description:
A landscape photograph depicting a hilly terrain with varied tree cover. The foreground is dominated by a dense canopy of lush green broadleaved trees. In the midground and background, the vegetation becomes sparser, featuring individual trees and shrubs scattered across dry, light-coloured slopes. Distant hills are visible under a bright sky.
The accompanying caption provided for this image is: "Broadleaved forest (beech), Bavaria, Germany. Credits: M. Probeck."
